title: Elytra Nerf - Dimensional
description: Customizable extra Elytra durability loss, toggle per dimension.
body:
## Elytra Nerf - Dimensional 

Ever notice how once players get an elytra, the world instantly feels smaller?
Other forms of transportation become irrelevant almost immediately.

This datapack nerfs elytra usage so it remains useful for emergency escapes and quick ascents, but not as the primary mode of travel in the Overworld.

### Functionality

- Increases elytra durability loss per use in selected dimensions

- Drastically reduced flight time before repairs are required

- Each time the elytra would lose 1 durability, it loses additional durability

- By default, only the Overworld is affected

## Settings
_to open the settings, you need the apropriate permissions to run commands_

to open type: /function phy_eon:settings 

The Following settings are available:
- [Toggle] Overworld
- [Toggle] Nether
- [Toggle] End
- [Set Damage] (defaults to -25)

![Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VGc7AyDx/images/778db3a942ffe0e5d82545e27fdb84d0cf69ab87.png)
